basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Three years graduate degree in psychology + three years post qualification experience OR Post Graduate in Psychology
qualification.details: Three years graduate degree in psychology + three years post qualification experience OR Post Graduate in Psychology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Technical Support-III position at AIIMS Delhi is 01 July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a three-year graduate degree in psychology with three years of post-qualification experience, or a Post Graduate degree in Psychology to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support-III post is 35 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Project Technical Support-III role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Technical Support-III position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 36,400 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-III position at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Technical Support-III position is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. While not explicitly stated that only Delhi residents can apply, it is advisable to check the official notification for any domicile restrictions.
